messages.content: 语法检查：Peak I, Peak II and Peak III represent weak, medium, and strong acid sites, respectively
没有语法错误。

英文降重：the Ni/SAPO-11 catalyst prepared by the impregnation method has fewer acid sites than the SAPO-11, ascribing to the destruction of the pore structure from solvents and coverage of acid sites by metal species

The impregnation method-prepared Ni/SAPO-11 catalyst has a lower number of acid sites compared to pure SAPO-11 due to solvent-induced damage to the pore structure and the covering of acid sites by metal species.
去掉-

The impregnation method prepared Ni/SAPO-11 catalyst has a lower number of acid sites compared to pure SAPO-11 due to solvent-induced damage to the pore structure and the covering of acid sites by metal species.

语法检查：the Ni/SAPO-11 catalyst prepared by the impregnation method has fewer acid sites than the SAPO-11 due to the destruction of the pore structure from solvents and coverage of acid sites by metal species
没有语法错误。
语法错误：The discussion of the product distribution at similar n-hexane conversion was performed and the results are shown in Fig. 11 and Table. S5.
错误已改正：The discussion of the product distribution at similar n-hexane conversions was performed, and the results are shown in Fig. 11 and Table S5.
英文降重：The discussion of the product distribution at similar n-hexane conversion was performed and the results are shown in Fig. 11 and Table. S5.
The product distribution at similar n-hexane conversions was discussed, and the results are presented in Fig. 11 and Table S5.
performed换一下
可以这样改写：The product distribution at similar n-hexane conversions was analyzed, and the resulting data is displayed in Fig. 11 and Table S5.
换一句 is of great importance for
可以改为：Understanding the relationship between X and Y is crucial for...
语法检查:Investigating the effect of metal particle size in metal-catalyzed heterogeneous reactions is vital importance for constructing efficient catalysts.
存在一个语法错误，应改为：Investigating the effect of metal particle size in metal-catalyzed heterogeneous reactions is of vital importance for constructing efficient catalysts.
把is vital importance for换一下
可以改为：is crucial for the development of efficient catalysts.
语法检查：Investigating the effect of metal particle size in metal-catalyzed heterogeneous reactions is crucial for the constructing efficient catalysts.
存在一个语法错误，可以这样改写：Investigating the effect of metal particle size in metal-catalyzed heterogeneous reactions is crucial for constructing efficient catalysts.
语法检查：Investigating the effect of metal particle size in metal-catalyzed heterogeneous reactions is crucial for constructing efficient catalysts.
句子结构正确，没有语法错误。
英语重写：This work contributes to a deep insight into the metal particle size effects in hydroisomerization over the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts and can be extended to various metal supported catalysts.

Rewritten: This study provides a deeper understanding of the impact of metal particle size on the hydroisomerization reaction over Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts, and can be generalized to other metal-supported catalysts.

语法检查：This work contributes to a deeper understanding of the impact of metal particle size effects in hydroisomerization over the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts and can be extended to various metal supported catalysts.
句子结构正确，没有语法错误。
把results in更换一下：Reducing the metal particles results in a sharp decrease in the fraction of terrace sites and an increase in the fraction of step/corner sites.
可以这样改写：A reduction in the metal particles leads to a significant decrease in the fraction of terrace sites and an increase in the fraction of step/corner sites.
英语重写： Moreover, the high nickel dispersion over the catalyst provides an excess of metal sites
Rewritten: Additionally, the high dispersion of nickel over the catalyst offers an abundance of metal sites.

英语重写：
Then, CO pulse injection was conducted onto the samples with pure He flow (20 mL min−1 ), and the CO/He gas mixture was injected (calibrated injection valve: 104 μL 10 % CO/He per pulse) until the intensities of three CO-peaks in a row keep constant. F.

Rewritten: Next, a CO pulse injection was administered to the samples, at a flow rate of 20 mL min−1 of pure helium. A CO/He gas mixture, calibrated to 104 μL 10% CO/He per pulse, was subsequently injected until three consecutive CO-peaks maintained a constant intensity.
英文重写：The infrared spectra of the catalysts were measured by Nicolet-6700 FTIR spectrometer.
The catalysts' infrared spectra were obtained using a Nicolet-6700 FTIR spectrometer.
Nicolet-6700 FTIR spectrometer开头写
The sentence can be rewritten as follows: A Nicolet-6700 FTIR spectrometer was used to measure the infrared spectra of the catalysts.
This can be attributed to the中be attributed to换一下
可以改为：This can be accounted for by...
把 attributed换一下：This can be attributed to the solvent-induced destruction of the SAPO-11 phase structure.
可以这样改写：This can be ascribed to the destruction of the SAPO-11 phase structure induced by the solvent.
语法检查：These catalysts all have I and IV mixed type of N2 adsorption isotherms
这句话存在一个语法错误，可以这样改写：All these catalysts exhibit a mixed type I and IV N2 adsorption isotherm.
英文降重：Fig. 4a-d manifest uniformly dispersed Ni particles in all four catalysts without apparent aggregation.
图4a-d显示四种催化剂中镍颗粒均匀分散，且没有明显的聚集。可以改为：Figure 4a-d demonstrates uniform dispersion of nickel particles in all four catalysts, without any visible aggregation.
语法检查：Figure 4a-d demonstrates uniform dispersion of nickel particles in all four catalysts, without any visible aggregation.
句子结构正确，没有语法错误。
英文重写：The peak at ca. 857.5 eV (2p3/2), along with the one at 874.8 eV (2p1/2) is attributed to the Ni2+, which originates from the quick oxidation of Ni0 in air during the sample transfer

Rewritten: The peak observed at approximately 857.5 eV (2p3/2), in combination with the peak at 874.8 eV (2p1/2), has been attributed to Ni2+, which is formed by the rapid oxidation of Ni0 during sample transfer in air.
语法检查：The peaks at ca. 857.5 eV (2p3/2) and 874.8 eV (2p1/2) are attributed to the Ni2+, which is formed by the rapid oxidation of Ni0 during sample transfer in air
句子结构正确，没有语法错误。
英文降重：Taking SAPO-11 as an example to illustrate the fitting process and the results shown in Fig. 8b. Peak I, Peak II and Peak III represent weak, medium, and strong acid sites, respectively.

To illustrate the fitting process, we can use SAPO-11 as an example, and the resulting outcomes are displayed in Fig. 8b. Here, Peak I, Peak II, and Peak III represent weak, medium, and strong acid sites, respectively.
不用第一人称

Rewritten: The fitting process and results for SAPO-11 are demonstrated in Figure 8b. The peaks labeled as Peak I, Peak II, and Peak III correspond to weak, medium, and strong acid sites, respectively.
降重：Taking SAPO-11 as an example to illustrate the fitting process and the results shown in Fig. 8b.
可以这样改写：As an example, SAPO-11 was used to illustrate the fitting process and the results displayed in Fig. 8b.

英文重写：This is because small Ni particles possessed a higher amount of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites, which favored the intermediate’s timely hydrogen on the metal sites instead of excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acid sites.

Rewritten: This can be attributed to the fact that smaller Ni particles have a higher number of Ni sites and consist of a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites. As a result, these sites facilitate intermediate's prompt hydrogenation on the metal sites, preventing extensive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking at the acid sites.
these sites替换一下

这里可以使用"such sites"来替换"these sites"，即This can be attributed to the fact that smaller Ni particles have a higher number of Ni sites and consist of a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites. As a result, such sites facilitate intermediate's prompt hydrogenation on the metal sites, preventing extensive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking at the acid sites.
用代词呢上述因素

可以使用代词 "they" 代替 "small Ni particles possessed a higher amount of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites", 如下所示：

This is because they have a higher amount of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites, which favor the intermediate's prompt hydrogenation on the metal sites, preventing extensive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking at the acid sites.
语法检查：This favored the intermediate’s timely hydrogen on the metal sites instead of excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acid sites.
句子结构正确，没有语法错误。

语法检查：This is because small Ni particles possessed a higher amount of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites. This favored the intermediate’s timely hydrogen on the metal sites instead of excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acid sites.
这两个句子的语法都正确。
句式更多样一些

可以这样改写：

Since small Ni particles have a higher number of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites, such features aid in prompt hydrogenation of the intermediate on metal sites, thereby preventing extensive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking at acidic sites.
英文重写：which favored the intermediate’s timely hydrogen on the metal sites instead of excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acid sites.
Rewritten: thereby facilitating prompt hydrogenation of the intermediate on the metal sites and avoiding excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acidic sites.
换一下句式：Reducing the metal particles leads to a sharp decrease in the fraction of terrace sites and an increase in the fraction of step/corner sites.
可以这样改写：A decrease in the metal particles results in a significant decrease in the ratio of terrace sites and a corresponding increase in the ratio of step/corner sites.
